title: Can't convert a SLICESEL to constant (when it should be possible).

features.name: slice_selection_on_unpacked_array_constant
features.description: Code should include a localparam unpacked array constant with a slice selection that selects fewer elements than the original array
features.snippet:
localparam int unsigned A3 [2:0] = '{4,5,6};
localparam int unsigned B32_B [1:0] = A3[1:0];

features.name: reversed_slice_selection_on_unpacked_array_constant
features.description: Code should include a localparam unpacked array constant with a slice selection using reversed index range
features.snippet:
localparam int unsigned A3 [2:0] = '{4,5,6};
localparam int unsigned B32_T [1:0] = A3[2:1];
